name: Spicy Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 lb baking potatoes, peel, cut in chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 cups of water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Add the potatoes and garlic. Cover and simmer until the potatoes are fork-tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Drain the potatoes.
4. Return the potatoes and garlic to the saucepan.
5. Add butter, milk, and salt. Mash the potato mixture with a potato masher.
6. Sprinkle with a little hot pepper sauce if desired.
